message:
fix: 4 Dolt server bugs — phantom dirs, orphan detection, read-only recovery, stale locks

Bug 1 (gt-hs1i2, P0): Corrupted phantom database dirs crash entire server.
ListDatabases now validates .dolt/noms/manifest exists before including a
database. Start() quarantines phantom dirs before launching the server.

Bug 2 (gt-q8f6n, P1): Unregistered rigs get their DBs destroyed by cleanup.
collectReferencedDatabases now checks routes.jsonl and scans top-level dirs
for metadata.json, not just rigs.json. RemoveDatabase requires --force for
databases that have user tables.

Bug 3 (gt-r1cyd, P1): DROP during cleanup puts server into read-only mode.
gt dolt cleanup now health-checks after each DROP and auto-recovers via
RecoverReadOnly if read-only state is detected.

Bug 4 (gt-tosjp, P2): Stale dolt.lock blocks recovery. Start() now retries
lock acquisition with backoff (3s total), then removes stale lock file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
